title: Hashim group
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Hashim''''' was a group of three [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvettes]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. They were to retrieve [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] prototypes from the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Mharsup]]''. They were attacked by six [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] but [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] managed to protect them. Maarek then boarded one of them, and they jumped to hyperspace to try and reach safety. However, they were ambushed by the [[Rneekii]] pirates with the [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] ''[[Intombe]]''. Though they were disabled, the [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]] were saved by Maarek Stele again. However, while awaiting a repair crew from [[Cargo ferry]] group [[Mssan]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] attempted to attack the cargo ferries. They were stopped again by Maarek, but while he was distracted by the Rebels, [[Nami]] pirates then attacked Hashim 1 and captured it. Rneekii pirates made an another appearance in the [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]] ''[[Sumpntodo]]'', but they were again driven off by Maarek Stele.

==Behind the scenes==
''Hashim'' in Arabic means 'destroyer of evil'. It is also likely to refer to hashashim, the original word for "assassin".

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]''
